description: Contract Amendment - modifications to an existing agreement's terms, scope, or commercial provisions

amendment_metadata.description: Core identification details of the amendment and the original agreement it modifies

amendment_title.description: Official title of the amendment document

amendment_date.description: Date the amendment was executed or made effective

original_agreement_title.description: Title of the original agreement being amended

original_agreement_date.description: Effective date or execution date of the original agreement

original_agreement_id.description: Reference number or identifier of the original agreement

parties.description: Parties to the amendment (should match original agreement parties)

legal_name.description: Full legal name of the party

role.description: Party's role in the contract (e.g., Client, Provider, Licensor, Licensee)

effective_date_of_changes.description: Date when the amended terms take effect (may differ from amendment execution date)

governing_law.description: Jurisdiction whose laws govern the amendment
extraction_hints: in accordance with the laws of

scope_of_changes.description: Detailed inventory of all sections and provisions being modified, added, or removed

sections_amended.description: List of existing sections that are being modified

original_section.description: Section number or title in the original agreement being changed

change_type.description: Nature of the change being made to this section

summary_of_change.description: Brief summary describing what was changed and how

new_sections_added.description: Entirely new sections introduced by this amendment

description.description: Brief description of what the new section covers

sections_deleted.description: Sections from the original agreement that are entirely removed
extraction_hints: shall be of no further force or effect

commercial_changes.description: Modifications to pricing, fees, payment terms, and other financial provisions

pricing_changes.description: Changes to the contract's pricing structure or amounts

original_value.description: Original contract value or pricing before the amendment

new_value.description: New contract value or pricing after the amendment

change_reason.description: Stated reason for the pricing change

payment_term_changes.description: Changes to payment timing, milestones, or invoicing terms

additional_fees.description: New fees introduced by the amendment

reduced_fees.description: Fees reduced or eliminated by the amendment

total_contract_value_change.description: Net impact on total contract value (increase or decrease amount)

currency.description: Currency for all financial amounts referenced in the amendment

term_changes.description: Modifications to contract duration, renewal provisions, and expiration terms

original_expiration_date.description: Expiration date of the contract before this amendment

new_expiration_date.description: Updated expiration date after the amendment

term_extension_months.description: Number of months the contract term is being extended

new_renewal_terms.description: Updated auto-renewal or renewal option provisions

new_notice_period_days.description: Updated number of days required for termination or non-renewal notice

early_termination_changes.description: Changes to early termination rights, fees, or conditions

scope_changes.description: Modifications to the services, deliverables, geographies, or volumes covered by the contract

services_added.description: New services or deliverables added to the contract scope

services_removed.description: Services or deliverables removed from the contract scope

services_modified.description: Existing services whose scope or specifications have been changed

service.description: Name or identifier of the service being modified

original_scope.description: Description of the service scope before the amendment

new_scope.description: Description of the updated service scope after the amendment

geography_changes.description: Changes to geographic coverage, territories, or service regions

volume_changes.description: Changes to volume commitments, capacity, or quantity thresholds

sla_changes.description: Modifications to service level agreements, performance metrics, and associated penalties

sla_metrics_changed.description: Existing SLA metrics whose targets or definitions have been updated

metric_name.description: Name of the SLA metric being changed (e.g., uptime, response time)

original_target.description: Original target value before the amendment

new_target.description: Updated target value after the amendment

new_sla_metrics_added.description: New SLA metrics introduced by this amendment

sla_metrics_removed.description: SLA metrics that are removed or no longer tracked

penalty_changes.description: Changes to SLA penalty or service credit structures

legal_changes.description: Modifications to legal clauses including liability, indemnification, compliance, and data protection

liability_changes.description: Changes to limitation of liability caps, exclusions, or carve-outs

indemnification_changes.description: Changes to indemnification obligations, scope, or procedures

insurance_changes.description: Changes to insurance coverage requirements or minimum amounts

compliance_changes.description: Changes to regulatory compliance obligations or certifications

ip_ownership_changes.description: Changes to intellectual property ownership, licensing, or usage rights

confidentiality_changes.description: Changes to confidentiality obligations, definitions, or survival periods

data_protection_changes.description: Changes to data protection, privacy, or data processing provisions

ratification.description: Confirmation clauses, preservation of unchanged terms, and execution details

all_other_terms_remain.description: Whether the amendment confirms all other terms of the original agreement remain unchanged
extraction_hints: remain in full force and effect

entire_agreement_updated.description: Whether this amendment updates the entire agreement clause

supersedes_prior_amendments.description: Whether this amendment supersedes any prior amendments on the same subject matter

counterparts_allowed.description: Whether the amendment may be executed in counterparts
extraction_hints: each of which shall be deemed an original

signatory_names.description: Names and details of individuals who signed the amendment

title.description: Official title or position of the signatory

date.description: Date the signatory executed the amendment
